title: chrysanthemum alpinum f. hutchisiifolium
intro: Chrysanthemum alpinum f. hutchisiifolium is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family, known for its showy white or pale yellow flowers and slender stems. The plant is also valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum alpinum f. hutchisiifolium are numerous, ranging from reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues to promoting digestion and improving cardiovascular health. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared as an herbal tea, decoction, or infusion, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
